name: IRCTC on RuPay Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Eligible railway ticket bookings on IRCTC

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 350 activation bonus Reward Points on a single transaction of ₹500 or more within 60 days of card issuance

renewalBenefitsValued.label: 500 Reward Points on payment of renewal fee

joiningBenefits: 350 activation bonus Reward Points on a single transaction of ₹500 or more within 60 days of card issuance
renewalBenefits: 500 Reward Points on payment of renewal fee
additionalBenefits: Save 1% transaction charges on eligible railway ticket bookings on IRCTC
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions, capped at ₹100 per statement cycle

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

internalNotes: Audited against official IRCTC SBI Card on RuPay product page on 2026-06-08.
The 10% value-back framing comes from 10 Reward Points per ₹100 on eligible railway ticket bookings through the IRCTC website and mobile app.
Reward Points accrued in the SBI Card account will not get credited to the IRCTC loyalty account if the loyalty account status is blocked, inactive, or suspended.
In case of railway ticket cancellation, a charge of 1% of the total refund amount is debited to the card.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-09.
